frame_eqs_str: a['dec_f']=pow(0.2, div(30,a['fps'])); a['dec_m']=pow(0.5, div(30,a['fps'])); a['n']=0; for(var mdparser_idx346=0;mdparser_idx346<256;mdparser_idx346++){a['exc']=(pow(a['gmegabuf'][Math.floor(a['n'])], 1)+0.1); a['dec']=((Math.abs(((a['exc']>a['gmegabuf'][Math.floor((5000+a['n']))])?1:0))>0.00001)?(a['dec_f']):(a['dec_m'])); a['gmegabuf'][Math.floor((5000+a['n']))]=((a['gmegabuf'][Math.floor((5000+a['n']))]*a['dec'])+((1-a['dec'])*a['exc'])); a['n']+=1;}
